productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Evo Black Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Evo shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These shoes are great for regular use as their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperLeather uppers for durability and protectionPerforations on sides and mesh tongue for enhanced breathabilityLace-ups for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortBrand name printed on the tongue and cat logo behind collarCupsole for added comfortMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day comfortEVa midsole for greater shock absorptionOutsoleNon-slip rubber outsole for greater tractionPivot points on the big toe mound and heel for easy 180 degree movementFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet
